hero.body: VACEI is the structured digital workspace where businesses can request professional services, receive proposals from verified firms, and manage documents, compliance, and workflows in one place.
hero.body2: Register once to receive your quote, invite your advisors, and manage everything through one secure platform.
hero.footnote: From onboarding to ongoing compliance, everything runs through one workspace.

auditPlatform.body: Running a business means coordinating with accountants, auditors, lawyers, tax advisors, and corporate service providers. Too often, that work is scattered across emails, folders, spreadsheets, and disconnected systems. VACEI brings everything together into one structured workspace so businesses and advisors can work with more visibility, accountability, and control.

principles.title: Structured Workflows
principles.desc: Clear engagement stages, defined responsibilities, and progress tracking across every service.

principles.title: Controlled Documentation
principles.desc: Centralised files, organised records, version visibility, and secure document exchange.

principles.title: Review and Approval Layers
principles.desc: Defined review flows, tracked comments, and sign-off history across services.

principles.title: Secure Client Interaction
principles.desc: Requests, uploads, approvals, and communication handled inside a controlled environment.

workspaceEntry.card1Body: Manage all your advisors in one place. Upload documents, track deadlines, respond to requests, and coordinate professional services from one dashboard.
card1Bullets: Keep all advisors in one place
workspaceEntry.card2Body: Set up your company and centralise incorporation, approvals, compliance, and ongoing support in the same workspace you will use to run the business.

inviteAdvisors.body: Already working with an accountant, auditor, lawyer, or corporate service provider? Bring them into your VACEI workspace and manage requests, documents, approvals, and deadlines in one structured environment.
inviteAdvisors.gifAlt: Invite advisor, advisor joins, shared workspace

howItWorks.subtitle: Create a workspace, invite your advisors, and manage every engagement, document and deadline in one structured platform.

steps.title: Define Your Scope
steps.description: Register and answer a few simple questions to define the professional services your business needs.

steps.title: Receive Proposals
steps.description: Compare bids from verified firms, ensuring the best fit for your requirements and budget.

steps.title: Appoint Your Advisors
steps.description: Select with confidence and engage through our structured digital environment.

steps.title: Centralize Workflows
steps.description: Track progress, manage documents, and coordinate everything through your secure workspace.

request.title: Let's Start
request.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself

phone.label: Phone Number (required for WhatsApp / Phone Call)

sidebarSteps.title: Define
sidebarSteps.description: Register and tell us what your business needs.

sidebarSteps.title: Match
sidebarSteps.description: Relevant providers review your request and prepare proposals.

sidebarSteps.title: Execute
sidebarSteps.description: Once you choose your provider, the work continues inside your VACEI workspace.

processSteps.columnBody: To receive an instant quote or proposals through VACEI, you first create your workspace. This allows your requests, documents, and advisor communication to stay structured from the beginning.

errors.phoneRequired: Phone number is required for this communication method.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: Request Received
success.body: We've received your request. Our team will review the details and get back to you within 24 hours.

beforeAfter.subtitle: VACEI replaces fragmented coordination with one intelligent, structured ecosystem for business services.
afterItems: One place to track requests and deadlines
Better visibility and control across the business
beforeAfter.footerLine: No more guessing. No more missing files. No more disconnected workflows.

servicesSection.subtitle: VACEI helps your business access and manage professional services through one structured workspace.
servicesSection.defaultSubtitle: Structured support delivered through one digital platform.

serviceSubtitles.accounting-finance: Accounting support, bookkeeping workflows, document handling, and structured financial coordination.
serviceSubtitles.tax-compliance: Tax filings, advisory work, deadlines, supporting records, and ongoing tax support.
serviceSubtitles.audit-assurance: Statutory audits, assurance engagements, working paper coordination, and milestone-driven delivery.
serviceSubtitles.corporate-csp-services: Company secretarial services, governance support, statutory maintenance, and corporate administration.
serviceSubtitles.regulated-licensing: Support for licence applications, renewals and key regulatory submissions.
serviceSubtitles.advisory-growth: Corporate legal support, contracts, transactions, advisory, and cross-border structuring support.
serviceSubtitles.vat-services: VAT registrations, VAT returns, compliance support, and indirect tax assistance.
serviceSubtitles.payroll-employment: Payroll administration, employment support, and compliance filings.

marketplace.body: Send out a Request for Proposal (RFP) to top-tier firms. Choose between local, regional, and global providers. The VACEI Marketplace gives you direct access to a network of verified professional firms.

steps.title: Request Service
steps.desc: Select the service your business needs and provide preliminary details through your secure workspace.

steps.title: VACEI Coordination
steps.desc: We notify verified partner firms and coordinate the proposal process to ensure quality and speed.

steps.title: Structured Proposals
steps.desc: Receive standardized proposals through your workspace, making them easy to compare and evaluate.

steps.title: Choose & Engage
steps.desc: Compare options, choose the advisor that best fits your needs, and start the engagement immediately.

whyVacei.subtitle: VACEI is built for the modern business. Whether you're a startup or an established group, our platform provides the structure you need to grow.
whyVacei.card1Body: All your companies, services, documents, and advisors in one place. No more searching through emails or fragmented spreadsheets.
whyVacei.card2Body: We only work with pre-vetted firms that meet our high standards for delivery, communication, and technical expertise.

trust.subtitle: From onboarding to ongoing compliance, everything runs through one workspace. Join the future of professional services management.
trust.largeCardBody: VACEI provides a resilient digital environment for unified coordination, ensuring your business stays operational and compliant across every territory.
trust.uptimeBody: Our platform operates at 99.99% availability, ensuring your workspace is always ready when you need it.

features.title: Bank-Grade Encryption
features.desc: All documents and communications are protected with end-to-end AES-256 encryption within a secure digital vault.

features.title: 24/7 Enterprise Support
features.desc: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock to assist with platform navigation and coordination.

companySetup.subtitle: Whether you're setting up in the UAE or globally, VACEI provides the structure you need to launch and grow.

complianceDashboard.body: Compliance isn't a one-time event; it's an ongoing process. Automated alerts, entity management, and regulatory updates keep you in the loop.
complianceDashboard.footerNote: Everything visible in one place—no spreadsheets, no manual trackers, no guessing.

multiCompany.body: Managing one company is hard. Managing ten shouldn't be. VACEI is built for founders and groups managing multiple entities.

activeEU.body: VACEI provides the digital environment for international businesses and founders to incorporate, manage, and scale their European operations with confidence.
